scripts.build: tsc -p . && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/cli.js', '#!/usr/bin/env node\nimport \'./src/cli.js\';'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.js', 'export * from \'./src/mcp.js\';');"
scripts.test:fast: npm run build && node --test dist/tests/adversarial-package-tests.test.js dist/tests/cache.test.js dist/tests/chaos-monorepo.test.js dist/tests/ecosystem-collision.test.js dist/tests/hotlist.test.js dist/tests/memory-forensics.test.js dist/tests/monorepo-validation.test.js dist/tests/release-check.test.js dist/tests/repro-chaos.test.js dist/tests/runtime-warfare.test.js dist/tests/validator.test.js dist/tests/verify-alias-bypass.test.js dist/tests/verify-build.test.js dist/tests/verify-circuit-breaker.test.js dist/tests/verify-git-refs.test.js dist/tests/verify-lockfile-integrity.test.js dist/tests/verify-offline-penalty.test.js dist/tests/verify-pattern-matching.test.js dist/tests/policy-packs.test.js
scripts.test:slow: npm run build && node --test dist/tests/integrity-check.test.js dist/tests/package-audit.test.js dist/tests/performance-chaos.test.js dist/tests/reproducibility.test.js dist/tests/smoke-test.test.js dist/tests/verify-exit-codes.test.js dist/tests/verify-json-output.test.js
